history.content:
<thought>
I am facing right on the second row. The cell directly ahead is lava, so I should not move forward. I need to go around it by turning downward first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down, with an open cell directly ahead. Moving forward will take me into the safe path below the lava, toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down on the middle-left side. The cell ahead is open, and moving forward will continue me toward the lower area where I can approach the goal from the left side.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am on the bottom row facing down, so moving forward would hit the wall. The goal is immediately to my right, so I need to turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right, and the goal is directly ahead of me. I should move forward into the goal cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
